_comment: Scenario 30: Cosys-AirSim static proving ground — Tier 3 flight through populated Blocks env with stationary obstacles only (pillars, walls, chairs, couches, bushes, mannequins). Exercises depth → occupancy grid → D*Lite → potential-field avoider. Dynamic-obstacle counterpart is scenario 31.

gt_class_map._comment: Ground-truth class map for #573 baseline capture. Keys match spawned-object names in config/scenes/cosys_static.json — trailing `*` is a prefix wildcard. class_id values use COCO indices where a COCO class exists; non-COCO obstacles (pillars, walls) use custom id 100. See docs/guides/CONFIG_GUIDE.md → 'gt_class_map' and issue #594.

scenario.name: cosys_static
scenario.description: Flight through a populated Blocks environment with 9 static obstacles spawned via RPC. Validates every perception stage (radar, YOLO, depth) actually produces non-zero output, occupancy grid fills with known obstacles, and the avoider at least touches the plan.

perception._comment_detector: color_contour for scenario 30 (#513). Validated 2026-04-19: drone successfully navigated the previously-impassable WP2→WP3 gap when color_contour was active (vs 0% with yolov8 on COCO — none of the scenario's obstacles are COCO classes). bush_01's green + UE5 environment colour variation is enough to populate the tracker for fusion with LiDAR-as-radar. Tightened params here to prevent over-promotion (previous run saturated 1000 static cells + 8725 occupied — D*Lite couldn't find a path on WP3→WP4).

obstacle_avoidance._comment: WP3→WP4 gap: planner cruises at cruise_speed_mps=2.0, so a 2.0 clamp leaves no headroom for lateral repulsion to redirect the trajectory. Raised to 3.5 m/s (Issue #503). path_aware_bypass_hysteresis_m controls the re-enable distance once the drone clears the close regime (min_distance_m + hysteresis).

occupancy_grid._comment: Scenario 30 grid tuning post-#513 color_contour switch: previous run hit max_static_cells=1000 cap with 8725 total occupied cells — D*Lite saw walls everywhere and couldn't find a path. Raised promotion_hits 5→10 so a cell needs more confident observations before sticking; reduced max_static_cells 1000→500 so the grid stays tractable for D*Lite search. inflation_radius_m kept at 2.5 (drone footprint + margin).

mission_planner._comment_static_obstacles: No HD-map. Perception-driven avoidance via radar+camera+depth fusion — the RPC-spawned scene objects are the world.

waypoints._comment: Start — takeoff point is the home spawn.
Enter person cluster — person_01 and chair_01 are here.
Fly between pillar_02 and wall_02 — forces tight avoidance.
Approach bush_01 and person_02 — return-leg obstacles.

mission_planner._comment_waypoints: 5-waypoint mission routed through the 9 spawned static obstacles. acceptance_radius_m=2.0 to keep the drone close enough to obstacles to trigger avoidance.

mavlink._comment: Tier 3 uses SimpleFlight via AirSim RPC (see ADR-011 amendment for #490). Was PX4 before SimpleFlight decision.

checks.name: Radar first scan
checks._comment: CosysRadar backend successfully polled LiDAR data at least once.

checks.name: Detector detections (non-zero)
checks._comment: Detector (yolov8 or color_contour) fired on the spawned/environment objects — at least 10 non-empty detection frames. Regex matches both backends so the check stays valid as the scenario's detector choice evolves.

checks.name: Depth Anything V2 running
checks._comment: DA V2 pipeline actually running (enabled=true honoured).

checks.name: Occupancy grid populated
checks._comment: At least one cell promoted from perception output.

checks.name: Avoider / D*Lite sees obstacles
checks._comment: D*Lite saw occupied cells or potential-field corrected the plan.

checks.name: VIO remained NOMINAL
checks._comment: Inverse check: zero DEGRADED events (Cosys ground-truth VIO should stay green).

checks.name: Mission completed (LANDED)
checks._comment: FSM reached LANDED — drone navigated the full 5-waypoint loop.
